rationale: The cited paper is directly about a WOM antecedent (need for uniqueness and when consumers provide positive WOM), while the citing paper explicitly builds a framework of WOM antecedents and states it extends prior antecedent research. Given this strong conceptual overlap and exact DOI match in the references (10.1509/jmkr.47.3.553), the citation could be a substantive theory/background source rather than an obvious incidental mention.
